message:
test(core): property-based tests for recorder_storage and tantivy_policy (45 tests)

proptest_recorder_storage.rs (20 tests): serde roundtrips for all 13
serializable types — RecorderBackendKind, DurabilityLevel, FlushMode,
RecorderOffset, AppendResponse, CheckpointConsumerId, RecorderCheckpoint,
CheckpointCommitOutcome, RecorderStorageHealth, RecorderConsumerLag,
RecorderStorageLag, FlushStats, RecorderStorageErrorClass — with snake_case
format validation and distinctness checks.

proptest_tantivy_policy.rs (25 tests): LoadRegime classify boundaries and
serde, MergeStrategy serde/snake_case, CommitPolicy serde/defaults/for_regime
invariants (min_interval <= max_interval), MergePolicyConfig
serde/defaults/for_regime (Overload→NoMerge, Steady→default),
IndexTuningConfig serde/defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
